title: Elevator Safety Notice
scenario: Create an elevator safety notice in English that can be used in a multi-story building. The notice should include the following points: emergency phone number, evacuation procedure, and a warning about overcrowding. The notice should be concise and easy to read.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated notice adheres to the word count and format constraints.
Verify if the notice contains the required information (emergency phone number, evacuation procedure, and overcrowding warning).
